features: REVITALISING MOISTURE: A highly effective, revitalising and moisturising cream that leaves your skin soft and supple for up to 48h; quality skincare all day long
ALL PURPOSE: This moisturiser for women is a combined face, hand and body moisturiser, helping you to save precious space on your bathroom shelves
QUICK ABSORPTION: NIVEA's moisturising lotion formula refreshes the skin with Vitamin E and Jojoba Oil, which is quickly absorbed and works to moisturise deeply
HOW TO APPLY: Simply massage into the skin post-shower for maximum benefit; when using as a face moisturiser take extra care to avoid the eye area
description: Product Description NIVEA Soft Moisturising Cream (500ml) - Freshly moisturised skin for 48h NIVEA Soft is a highly effective, revitalising moisturising cream for everyday use. The light formula with Vitamin E and Jojoba Oil is quickly absorbed and refreshes the skin. Enjoy the invigorating feeling that leaves your skin soft and supple for up to 48h. This face, body and hand moisturiser is ideal for anyone who prefers a low-maintenance approach to skincare, or someone looking to save space amongst their beauty supplies. NIVEA Soft provides refreshing body and face care in one handy pot. Application information: Apply the dry skin cream to the hands, face or body by hand, massaging into the skin in small circles. Allow the cream to be naturally absorbed by the body. Can be used every day and should be for best results. For moisturisers with specific uses, such as our SPF moisturiser or tinted moisturiser, see our full range of NIVEA products. Product benefits: Highly effective, revitalising moisturising cream Quickly absorbs and refreshes the skin Leaves your skin soft and supple For everyday use Vegan formula Dermatologically approved Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Paraffinum Liquidum, Myristyl Alcohol, Butylene Glycol, Alcohol Denat., Stearic Acid, Myristyl Myristate, Cera Microcristallina, Glyceryl Stearate, Hydrogenated Coco-Glycerides, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil, Tocopheryl Acetate, Lanolin Alcohol (Eucerit), Polyglyceryl-2 Caprate, Dimethicone, Sodium Carbomer, Phenoxyethanol, Linalool, Citronellol, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Limonene, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Salicylate, Parfum Manufacturer Contact Information Beiersdorf UK Ltd. Trinity Central Trinity Park Bickenhill Lane Birmingham B37 7ES See more
